notice: Positions are approximate state clusters until reviewed county/town geometries are added. Tiers are neutral analysis bands, not legal rankings or findings.

no_data.description: No law records are available for this unit in the published analysis artifact.
no_data.label: No publishable data

tier_1.description: Lower relative neutral model-score band or sparse law signal.
tier_1.label: Tier 1

tier_3.description: Higher relative neutral model-score band. This is not a legal ranking.
tier_3.label: Tier 3
